_comment: Game list for the MakeCode Arcade Kiosk. Three id formats supported: (1) 20-digit share id e.g. '50225-04801-24334-14778', (2) persistent share id e.g. '_aBcDeF', (3) GitHub repo path e.g. 'greglamb/elliots-game' optionally with #ref suffix like 'greglamb/elliots-game#v1.0'. Replace the placeholder entries with Elliot's actual GitHub repos.

games.name: Elliot's Game (placeholder)
games.description: Replace this entry with one of Elliot's actual game repos

games.name: Space Destroyer
games.description: Use the lasers on your spaceship to shoot falling asteroids!

games.name: Bunny Hop!
games.description: Help your bunny hop over obstacles as they run through the forest

games.name: Hot Air Balloon
games.description: Navigate your hot air balloon through the mountains avoiding birds and spaceships

games.name: Falling Duck
games.description: Fly through the sky avoiding obstacles
